text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The reference is a real GitHub repository released in 2023. The exact title "Stanford Alpaca: An Instruction-following LLaMA model" and the complete author list (Rohan Taori, Ishaan Gulrajani, Tianyi Zhang, Yann Dubois, Xuechen Li, Carlos Guestrin, Percy Liang, Tatsunori B. Hashimoto) are confirmed across multiple independent sources including the official BibTeX citation on GitHub and Hugging Face. It is a non-traditional (software/GitHub) citation rather than an academic paper, which explains why it was not found in academic databases.
LINK: https://github.com/tatsu-lab/stanford_alpaca
